str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - job-search-strategy
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: Coping with Job Loss in the Tech Sector
entry.summary: In today's competitive tech industry, job loss can be a major setback for professionals. The COVID-19 pandemic and economic downturn have only accelerated this trend, leaving many feeling lost and uncertain about their career paths. In this 8000-character blog post, we explore ten practical tips on how to cope with job loss in the tech sector. From accepting and processing emotions to building a network, staying active, taking care of mental health, seeking support, and learning from the experience, these tips aim to help professionals navigate through these challenging times. By following these guidelines, we hope that readers can come out stronger on the other side and emerge as more resilient and productive tech professionals. Let's share this post with our networks and help each other during these trying times!
